features: LASTING FRAGRANCE: Swirl In Wash Laundry Fragrance Booster, will add a long lasting Calming Infusion fragrance boost to your laundry. Suitable for all fabrics, colours , load sizes and washes. Single unit provides fragrance for 16 washes using the measuring cap provided

READY TO USE: Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, add crystals directly into the empty washing machine drum, add usual washing detergent, fabric conditioner if using and laundry booster, select preferred washing cycle. Enjoy the long lasting Calming Infusion fragrance in each laundry load
SLOW RELEASE: Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, developed to start releasing a fresh Calming Infusion scent at the start of the wash. Choose the amount of crystals to increase the scent depth
LAUNDRY FRESH: Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, perfect to add to seasonal laundry before storing away. Great for freshening sleeping bags, bedding, towels and sportswear
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Swirl Laundry Calming Infusion Fragrance Booster, ready to use, 350g resealable container
description: Product Description Swirl In Wash Laundry Fragrance Booster, will add a long lasting Claming Infusion fragrance boost to your laundry. Suitable for all fabrics, colours , load sizes and washes. Single unit provides fragrance for 16 washes. Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, add crystals directly into the empty washing machine drum, add usual washing detergent, fabric conditioner if using and laundry booster, select preferred washing cycle. Enjoy the long lasting Claming Infusion fragrance in each laundry load. Perfect to add to seasonal laundry before storing away. Great for freshening sleeping bags, bedding, towels and sportswear. Shop Amazon.co.uk for the Swirl range of laundry products. Swirl Laundry Calming Infusion Fragrance Booster, ready to use, 350g resealable container Ingredients Parfum, Linalool, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes. Directions 1. Add Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster crystals directly into the empty washing machine drum. 2. Add usual washing detergent, fabric conditioner if using and laundry booster. 3. Select preferred washing cycle. 4. The product is suitable for all fabrics, colours, load sizes and washes. 5. A single unit provides fragrance for 16 washes. 6. The Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster starts releasing a fresh Calming Infusion scent at the start of the wash. 7. It can be used to add a long lasting fragrance boost to seasonal laundry before storing away, ideal for freshening sleeping bags, bedding, towels and sportswear. See more
